name: PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk
summary: PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk engages in the mining business in Indonesia. It explores for gold, silver, copper, and other related minerals, as well as provides mining services. The company holds interests in the Tujuh Bukit Copper/Gold Project; Pani Joint Venture Project; Wetar / Morowali Acid Iron Metal; Tujuh Bukit Gold Production project; and Wetar Copper Production Project. It also offers processing and trading services. The company was formerly known as PT Merdeka Sera and changed its name to PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk in December 2014. PT Merdeka Copper Gold Tbk was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
